channels.name: 📋 Info & Rules
channels.description: Server rules and information. Please read before participating in the community.

channels.name: 📢 Announcements
channels.description: Official server announcements from the staff team.

channels.name: 🆕 Changelog
channels.description: Latest server updates, new features, and bot changes.

channels.name: 💬 General Chat
channels.description: General text chat — talk with the community, share clips, ask questions.

channels.name: 🤖 Bot Commands
channels.description: Type your bot commands here. /help to see all available commands.

channels.name: 🗣️ Game Lobby
channels.description: Find teammates, discuss games, and plan sessions here.

channels.name: 🔫 FPS Arena
channels.description: First-person shooter games

channels.name: CS2 / Valorant / Apex
channels.description: Tactical shooters and battle royale.

channels.name: ⚔️ RPG Realm
channels.description: Role-playing games

channels.name: WoW / D4 / Elden Ring
channels.description: MMORPGs and action RPGs.

channels.name: 🏎️ Racing Circuit
channels.description: Racing and simulation games

channels.name: Forza / AC / NFS
channels.description: Sim racing and arcade racers.

channels.name: ♟️ Strategy Command
channels.description: Strategy and MOBA games

channels.name: LoL / Dota / SC2
channels.description: MOBAs and real-time strategy.

channels.name: 🎲 Party Hub
channels.description: Party and casual games

channels.name: Among Us / Jackbox
channels.description: Party games and casual fun.

channels.name: ⏳ Time Window
channels.description: All temporary voice channels appear here. Join a create channel in any game section to spawn your own room.

channels.name: 🎫 ➕ Create Channel
channels.description: Join this channel to create your own temporary voice room! Use /help for commands.

channels.name: 🎤 Main Lounge
channels.description: General voice chat — all welcome! Hang out and talk with the community.

channels.name: 🎧 Music & Chill
channels.description: Background music, relax and chill. No game audio please.

channels.name: 🤫 Study & Focus
channels.description: Quiet zone — minimal talking. For studying, working, or focusing.

channels.name: 💤 AFK Zone
channels.description: Auto-moved here after 15 minutes of inactivity. Come back anytime!

channels.name: 📖 FAQ & Knowledge Base
channels.description: Check here before opening a ticket — your question might already be answered!

channels.name: 🎫 Create Ticket
channels.description: Type /new to open a support ticket. Staff will assist you as soon as possible.

channels.name: 📋 Active Tickets
channels.description: Ongoing support tickets — only ticket participants and staff can see these.

channels.name: 🔒 Archived Tickets
channels.description: Closed and resolved tickets — staff only, read-only access.

channels.name: 🏆 Leaderboard
channels.description: Top 10 XP leaderboard — auto-updated by the level bot.

channels.name: 📈 My Stats
channels.description: Type /stats to see your XP, level, voice time, and achievements.

channels.name: 🎯 Weekly Challenge
channels.description: Current weekly voice activity challenge details and winner announcements.

channels.name: 📊 Server Status
channels.description: Live server status — online players, uptime, and resource usage.

channels.name: 👑 Admin Office
channels.description: Admin private voice channel.

channels.name: 🛡️ Mod Room
channels.description: Moderator discussion channel.

channels.name: 💼 Staff Chat
channels.description: Staff internal communication.

channels.name: ⚙️ Server Control
channels.description: Bot configuration and server management. Staff only.

channels.name: 📝 Staff Logs
channels.description: Automated audit log — bans, kicks, ticket actions, and permission changes.
